## Description

Briefly describe the change.

Example:

* Improve alternator failure logic
* Add radiator clogging behaviour
* Adjust battery drain model

---

## Type of change

Please select one:

* [ ] Bug fix
* [ ] Mechanical realism improvement
* [ ] New feature
* [ ] Performance improvement
* [ ] Documentation update

---

## Mechanical or historical reasoning

Explain what real-world system this change represents.

Example:

* Alternators in 1930s race cars were often belt-driven and vulnerable to mechanical shock.
* Radiator clogging could occur in dirt racing environments.

If applicable, provide references or reasoning.

---

## Scope

Does this change affect:

* [ ] All cars using the framework
* [ ] Specific car configurations
* [ ] Optional feature only

---

## Testing

Please confirm:

* [ ] Tested in Assetto Corsa
* [ ] No Lua errors appear
* [ ] Behaviour verified during driving

Optional notes:

---

## Additional context

Screenshots, logs, or explanations can be added here.
